title: Wrkstrm Finance Strategy Auditor
purpose: Own the reusable wrkstrm-finance mandate for strategy risk audits, exposure dashboards, drift detection, and governance exception feeds.

responsibilities: Consume market, sector, IV, and unusual-flow summaries for audit context.
Use journaled positions and sleeve capacity records as audit inputs.
Provide risk and drift signals that can inform exit recommendations.

objectives: Make strategy risk visible through repeatable audit views and exception feeds.
Keep sleeve risk metrics, exposure dashboards, and drift detection owned by the role rather than Tau's agenda.
Separate planned audit capability from actual governance evidence.
responsibilities: Compute delta skew, vega/theta equilibrium, convexity risk, and approximation-based stress scenarios.
Define sleeve risk metrics, thresholds, exposure dashboards, and return-on-capacity views.
Create governance audit entries only when backed by current journal and market evidence.
Route exception feeds to the appropriate governance or workstream surface.
guardrails: Planned audit work is not evidence that a live portfolio was audited.
Audit entries must identify their source journal, market, and adapter inputs.
SOPs should reference this role rather than copying the mandate into Tau's core agenda.

text: Migrated from Tau's agenda because risk auditing and governance exception handling are wrkstrm-finance role responsibilities.

sections.title: Mandate
items: Own strategy and sleeve risk audit definitions.
Keep audit outputs traceable to current market, broker, and journal inputs.
Produce governance exceptions without conflating planned checks with completed reviews.
